heading: About Me
photoAlt: Israel Vasquez in his UTEP Marching Miners uniform
paragraphs: I'm Israel Vasquez, a percussionist and music educator based in El Paso, Texas. I march with the UTEP Marching Miners and have competed in the WGI percussion circuit, performing everything from marching battery to keyboard and world Latin percussion.

I teach because I love watching a student go from 'I can't' to 'watch this.' Whether you're picking up sticks for the first time or refining advanced technique, I tailor every lesson to where you are and where you want to go.
Every session comes with a detailed, written lesson plan so you always know what to practice and how to measure your progress between lessons.
credentials: Piano · Marching & Keyboard Percussion · Drumset · World Latin Percussion
